mapper.sql: a.id as id, a.addtime as addtime, a.huiyuanid as huiyuanid, a.zhanghao as zhanghao, a.jifenleixing as jifenleixing, a.jifenshu as jifenshu, a.yue as yue, a.shuoming as shuoming, a.guanliandingdan as guanliandingdan, a.caozuoren as caozuoren
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(jifenshu), 0) FROM jifen WHERE huiyuanid = #{huiyuanid}
